metadata.title: Chumash Foundations Resource Manifest
notes: These resources are versioned foundation seeds for standards alignment, analytics, paradigms, lexicon policy, and teacher operations.
They are loadable and validated, but they are not auto-promoted into the student-facing runtime.
Current student-facing source of truth remains the supported Streamlit runtime plus the active parsed dataset and runtime skill catalog.

resources.intended_use: Reference crosswalk between external standards frameworks and current engine skills; future input to catalog alignment, not current runtime source of truth.
Spreadsheet-friendly companion export for the canonical skill crosswalk.
Benchmark-informed blueprint for question archetypes, weighting, and DDI-aligned reporting; not wired into runtime selection yet.
Pronoun and verb paradigm seed data for future hinting, reteach, and diagnostic tools.
High-frequency lexicon policy and starter entries for future mastery prioritization and analytics.
Teacher/admin workflow reference for dashboards, readiness reporting, and action-plan tooling; not student-facing.
